prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this! Remember, every big task is just a series of small steps. You don't have to do it all at once - just break it down and take it one step at a time. You've tackled hard things before, and you'll do it again. So take a deep breath, get started, and know that you're capable of amazing things. You've got this!
